metadata.description: 2026 FIFA World Cup Round-of-32 third-placed-team assignment (FIFA Annex C).
metadata.source: FIFA tournament regulations, Annex C — transcribed from Wikipedia '2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage' and machine-validated.
metadata.winner_slots_note: The 8 group winners that face a third-placed team. The other 4 winners (C,F,H,J) face runners-up.
metadata.key_format: Sorted concatenation of the 8 group letters whose third-placed teams qualified, e.g. 'EFGHIJKL'.
metadata.assign_note: assign[X]=Y means Winner of Group X plays the third-placed team of Group Y (i.e. 1X vs 3Y).
